Detail: This is a Python-only reproducibility and small-cluster audit. It does not claim that a second external software implementation reproduced WCLR.
Report WCLR-C/WCLR-S only when the restricted logit model converges. A non-convergent restricted model invalidates restricted-bootstrap p-values.
The leave-one-country cluster jackknife refits 27 adjusted logit models and is independent of the linearized WCLR calculation.
Use WCLR-S as the primary bootstrap sensitivity statistic and WCLR-C as a transparent companion statistic only for convergent restricted models.
If the restricted RQ3 logit remains non-convergent, enter em dashes for WCLR-C/WCLR-S in Appendix C and state the reason in a footnote.
Final WCLR results use 29,999 Rademacher draws with seed 20260630. Monte-Carlo audit uses 3 seeds x 9,999 draws.
